creator: shige@FreeBSD.org
text:
From: Akinori MUSHA aka knu <knu@idaemons.org>
Subject: ports/16252: bsd.port.mk: Add bzip2 support for distribution patches
Date: Fri, 21 Jan 2000 21:42:25 +0900

knu> +				;; \
knu> +			*.bz2) \
knu> +				bzcat $$i | ${PATCH} ${PATCH_DIST_ARGS}; \

s/bzcat/bz2cat/ ?

And we can only use bzip2 when USE_BZIP2=YES environment.

--- shige
